blockers: Claims and DPs are draft-only — publication gate must block verified consumption.

deductions.finding: Claims and DPs are draft-only — publication gate must block verified consumption.

topFindings.reason: Required entities, relationships, claims, or decision points are missing per CKO §8–§9.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Resolve critical gaps via assigned factory agents before publication review.

topFindings.finding: Low evidence coverage (0% of proposals cite evidence)
topFindings.reason: Every proposal should cite supporting evidence per factory contract.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Ensure claim/relationship builders attach evidence_refs from the evidence packet.

topFindings.reason: Core diagnosis neighborhoods require standard clinical relationship patterns.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Add injured_in relationship via relationship-builder agent.

topFindings.reason: Core diagnosis neighborhoods require standard clinical relationship patterns.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Add has_classification relationship via relationship-builder agent.

topFindings.reason: Decision points support clinical reasoning and operative safety pathways.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Run decision-point-builder for operative_indication and nonoperative_eligible patterns.

topFindings.reason: High-priority gaps block maturity level advancement.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Schedule gap-resolution work items from ontology-work-plan.json.

topFindings.reason: Ontology contract requires complete relationship coverage.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Run the matching builder agent for missing_relationship.

topFindings.reason: Ontology contract requires complete claim coverage.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Run the matching builder agent for missing_claim.

topFindings.reason: Fracture diagnoses require classification when one exists clinically.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Link has_classification and has_grade edges to a classification system.

topFindings.evidence: Slugs: tibial-shaft-fracture, femoral-shaft-fracture, labrum, unicompartmental-knee-arthroplasty, patellar-tendon, gluteus-minimus, femoral-nerve, femur, proximal-femur, hip-capsule, quadriceps-tendon, cruciate-ligaments, short-external-rotators, tibia, gluteus-medius, cross-linked-polyethylene, ceramic-on-ceramic-bearing
topFindings.reason: Orphan entities cannot be traversed by products and indicate incomplete graph wiring.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Add inbound or outbound clinical/anatomy edges, or merge duplicates.

topFindings.evidence: Disconnected: labrum, patellar-tendon, gluteus-minimus, femoral-nerve, femur, proximal-femur, hip-capsule, quadriceps-tendon, cruciate-ligaments, short-external-rotators, tibia, gluteus-medius
topFindings.reason: Anatomy must connect to the condition graph for educational traversal.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Add involves_anatomy, injured_in, or part_of edges from condition/procedure anchors.

topFindings.evidence: conflict-report.json: Conflicting labels for labrum: "Glenoid Labrum" vs "Acetabular Labrum"
topFindings.reason: Unresolved merge conflicts indicate inconsistent agent outputs.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Run conflict-resolver agent and reconcile metadata/text conflicts.
